title: Don't Break My Lead!
description: Prevents boosting with a firework while gliding immediately breaking all of your leads in 1.21.6+.
body:
In 25w16a, Mojang added that when you use a firework rocket while gliding with an elytra, all of your attached leads break. This mod undoes that change. Does not require Fabric API!
Only works if the mod is on the server or in a singleplayer world. [Don't Break My Lead!](https://modrinth.com/mod/dont-break-my-lead) is licensed under the [CC-BY-NC 4.0 license](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc/4.0/legalcode.txt).
